description: CompositionThis light yellow half sleeve round neck t-shirt is made of 100% cottonFittingSlimCareMachine Wash separately in cold water, use mild detergent. Do not Bleach. Avoid Soaking. Remove promptly.Line Dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do Not Iron Directly on Print/embroidery.ActionA casual t-shirt, with a bit of graphics in front adds a style quotient to the tee, wear it while dressing up casually with a pair of nicely fitted jeans and the casual look is complete!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5"
